title: Lumpen und Seide
writer: Heinz Goldberg, Adolf Lantz, Richard Oswald
actors: Reinhold Schünzel, Mary Parker, Johannes Riemann
plot: At the center of this social satire is the wealthy and bored couple Irene and Erik. When Erik meets Hilde, who comes from a humble background, one evening in a chic club, he sees an opportunity for the couple to sexually spice up.
